algorithm_characterization: BigInteger arithmetic with byte-level primitives. Uses multi-precision multiplication, addition, subtraction, and modular reduction. Each (n, o, p) parameter triple from the W7 catalog is passed through this chain. The 23 decrypted-string constants loaded by w7 are the cipher's additional parameter array.
translation_status: Located + call graph mapped. Full algebraic translation requires C# decompilation (dnSpy/ILSpy) of 20+ helper methods. Static IL analysis confirms BigInteger structure consistent with PROVENANCE's claim of "big-integer cipher".
work_remaining_to_complete_w7_in_javascr: Decompile each helper method to C#-equivalent pseudocode
Reconstruct the bignum primitive layer (add/sub/mul/mod on byte arrays)
Map the (n, o, p) triple invocation back to the seed input
Test against a known (seed, key) pair from a real ECU bench
